description: Represents the status of a workload that is managed by an app agent.

appComponents.description: The list of App Components that this workload enforces.
appComponents.title: appComponents

healthDetails.description: Internal details about the status of the workload which can explain the health status. The format of the internal details are version, platform and workload specific and subject to change.
healthDetails.title: healthDetails

healthy.description: True if the workload is considered healthy from the perspective of the app agent.
healthy.title: healthy

lastHealthChange.description: The timestamp of the last change in health status.
lastHealthChange.title: lastHealthChange

title: WorkloadStatus
